race.comment: PACIFIC GLAMOUR (8) resumes. Her form last time in reads very well for this, beaten three lengths in a much better 3yo race at Flemington when last seen in January. Like her at 1000m having won her maiden dominantly over this track and distance and she should be going awfully close. OUR WYND CHYMES (5) won very nicely on debut over this route, showing speed and coming away to score by 2.5 lengths. She kicks up from the low gate and can go on with it. BEAR CHAMP (2) was an impressive winner first up off a very long spell at Werribee and has been kept fresh since with a tickover trial in between. He draws soft and can measure up. DONE LEAVY (9) broke through for a narrow maiden win here last time out and could go on with it. MOAKSUN (10) is going okay and can sneak into the finish.
